items.source: ad-hoc-news.de (Kering stock desk, EU/US investor wire)
items.title: Kering Stock Trades Lower as Gucci Turnaround Weighs on Guidance
items.summary: Investor-wire coverage notes Kering shares fell after the group flagged that Gucci's repositioning under Demna will keep weighing on 2026 guidance, with 2024-25 revenue down roughly 17% and Gucci's own decline running 10-20%, plus recurring operating income down several hundred million euros. Coverage stresses analysts want several quarters of like-for-like sales evidence at Gucci before revising valuations, with peers YSL and Bottega Veneta cited as more resilient parts of the portfolio.

items.title: Lindsey Vonn Wears Sequined Gucci Gown at 2026 ESPY Awards
items.summary: Alpine skier Lindsey Vonn wore a black one-sleeve sequined gown from Demna's Pre-Fall 2026 'Generation Gucci' collection to the July 15 ESPY Awards in New York, paired with Fred Leighton and Kwiat jewelry. Standard celebrity-dressing placement coverage in mainstream US entertainment press; keeps Gucci visible via red-carpet placement rather than a brand-initiated campaign push.

items.title: Coty and Kering Settle Gucci Beauty Licence Dispute as Part of Early L'Oreal Transition
items.summary: Legal-trade coverage recaps how Coty's Swiss subsidiary sued Gucci America, Guccio Gucci and Kering in UK commercial court after Kering's move to hand the Gucci Beauty licence to L'Oreal early; the parties settled on July 7, with Coty receiving about $400 million (roughly 20% of its market cap) and all litigation resolved. Positions Gucci's licensing pivot as reshaping a $500-600M-a-year fragrance relationship, with the new L'Oreal deal starting July 2027 instead of 2028.

items.title: PurseForum: 'Share Your July/August 2026 Purchases' Thread Active on New Gucci Buys
items.summary: Newly opened seasonal purchase-sharing thread on PurseForum's Gucci subforum where members post recent buys with photos; thread was created for the July/August 2026 window and is running alongside the long-standing Gucci deals-chat thread. Could not access full post-level content behind forum access restrictions, so specific item mix and sentiment detail are not verifiable this run; recorded as a signal of active organic community engagement volume only, not a sentiment read.
